title: Counting Stars
why_this_song: Counting Stars by OneRepublic (2013) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Lately, I've been, I've been losing sleep
Dreaming about the things that we could be
But baby, I've been, I've been praying hard
Take that money, watch it burn
Sink in the river the lessons I've learned
Take that money, watch it burn
Sink in the river the lessons I've learned

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "i've" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "i've" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "counting" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "counting" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Dreaming about the things we could be
Take that money, watch it burn

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Counting Stars", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Counting Stars", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Counting Stars" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Counting Stars" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Counting Stars" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Counting Stars", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: "Counting Stars" was released in 2013. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Counting Stars" foi lançada em 2013. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask OneRepublic one question about "Counting Stars", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para OneRepublic sobre "Counting Stars", o que seria e por quê?
